steps.title: Find the slope from the table
steps.content:
From $(1,34)$ to $(2,31)$, the output decreases by $3$ when the input increases by $1$:
$$
m=\frac{31-34}{2-1}=-3
$$

steps.title: Solve for the intercept
steps.content: Use $g(x)=mx+b$ and the point $(1,34)$: $$ 34=-3(1)+b $$ $$ b=37 $$ The answer is 37.
